meta.title: Making Global Business Run on Solana

transcript: Hello everyone. My name is Stepan, I'm the co-founder and CEO at Squads. And today I'm gonna talk to you about how we're gonna make global business run on Solana. But first, quick context. We have been developing Squads since 2021. We are the leading smart account and multisig infrastructure for Solana and SVM. And today we secure over 15 billion dollars in value. Our infrastructure also powers Squads Multisig, the canonical multisig for the Solana ecosystem, securing treasuries, programs, tokens and validators for all the teams that you can see here. When we were building Squads Multisig, one thing that we noticed in terms of how our customers use the product is that for a lot of them, the multisig became the de facto business bank account. They would run payroll, do all kinds of financial operations, essentially entirely on stablecoin rails, using our infrastructure and Solana. And so, that prompted us to build Altitude. Altitude is a global business account built on stablecoin rails. With Altitude, businesses can create a dollar and a euro account. They can send and receive fiat and stablecoin transfers. They get access to the full CFO suite with bill pay, invoicing, and accounting. And they can earn yield right on their capital in the Altitude account. As we were building Altitude, we noticed three unique advantages when it comes to building on stablecoin rails. The first one is reach. If you're a traditional fintech and you're trying to scale to global markets, you have to think about which market do I want to go into, you have to get licensed, you have to get local banking partnerships. That takes a lot of time, that takes a lot of money. When you're building on stablecoin rails, the model is flipped. By using self-custodial stablecoin accounts, you can create a stablecoin account for each of your customer globally without any regulatory hurdles. This is a unique model where first you go global, and then you establish the necessary local partnerships where you think it makes the most sense for your business. And then you establish the connectivity to traditional fiat and banking rails for pay-ins, pay-outs and card issuance. The second major advantage is speed. Altitude is born on Solana. And so we can leverage internet capital markets to facilitate DeFi yield, RWA yield, trading at record speed for our customers. In TradFi and traditional fintech, what would take six months of negotiating partnerships, for us is just a simple integration. And the final piece is autonomy. We hear a lot from the traditional fintech ecosystem that autonomous finance and self-driving finance is coming here. That soon our financial accounts will be fully autonomous, run by agents. But when you see the current implementations in the market, they all require human checks and human intervention. Why is that? It's because the agents, while clearly smart enough to run financial operations on our behalf, they can't be trusted. They can be compromised. They can hallucinate. They can make mistakes. And when it comes to money, almost always right is not good enough. So how do you solve that? You solve that by pairing probabilistic intelligence with deterministic execution. What that really means is that you can give an agent a key on your financial account and create very clear and strict programmatic guardrails what agent can and cannot do. So that allows you to give agent much more autonomy over your money when you're running your financial operations. So that means that intelligence isn't the main bottleneck today. The rails are. So what that means in practice? It means bill pay that checks and executes itself. It means recurring payments that run on schedule without any human intervention. It means treasury that allocates and rebalances across different yield sources without you needing to make any clicks. It's FX that auto-rebalances because now the time is right, not because somebody remembered to do this. So let's recap. Building on stablecoin rails gives you reach, gives you speed, and gives you access to truly autonomous finance. If this is exciting to you, and if you're thinking about building the next giant financial services company, I encourage you to do this on Solana. And you can use our infrastructure to do this 10x faster than us. We have our API product called Grid, which Carlos is gonna talk about tomorrow on stage, and you should catch up with him if that's exciting to you. And finally, with Altitude, today we're focusing on businesses that already have stablecoins on their balance sheet. But the future looks like that any global business will be able to leverage Altitude to run their financial operations entirely on stablecoins and on Solana. If you wanna know more about that, come see us at our booth on the second floor right here at Breakpoint. Thank you so much.

enrichment.generated_query: Altitude Making Global Business Run on Solana Breakpoint 2025 announcement

sources.title: Plume Brings Institutional Real-World Yield to Solana With Launch of RWA Nest Vaults
sources.snippet:
Plume Brings Institutional Real-World Yield to Solana With Launch of RWA Nest Vaults[Accessibility Statement](https://www.cision.com/about/accessibility/)[Skip Navigation](#main)
# Plume Brings Institutional Real-World Yield to Solana With Launch of RWA Nest Vaults
[![Plume Network Logo (PRNewsfoto/Plume Network)]( "Plume Network Logo (PRNewsfoto/Plume Network)")](#)
## News provided by
[**Plume Network**](https://www.prnewswire.com/news/plume-network/)
Dec 05, 2025, 09:15 ET
## Share this article
[
* **](javascript:;)[
* **](javascript:;)[
* **](javascript:;)[

**
**
Share this article
[
* **](javascript:;)[

* **](javascript:;)[
* **](javascript:;)[
* **](javascript:;)
Share toX
*Nest vaults with assets from WisdomTree, Hamilton Lane, BlackOpal and issuers including Securitize and SuperState mark the beginning of a new yield economy forSolana.*
NEW YORK,Dec. 5, 2025/PRNewswire/ --[Plume](https://edge.prnewswire.com/c/link/?t=0&l=en&o=4573545-1&h=1349188964&u=https://plume.org/&a=Plume), the leading RWA blockchain powering real-world yield, today announced the launch of five RWA Nest vaults onSolana, setting real-world yield as a new base layer for the ecosystem and marking an important first step in Plume's multichain expansion for Nest.
Launching the vaults natively onSolanagives users direct investment opportunities to institutional-grade assets from WisdomTree, Hamilton Lane, BlackOpal, and issuers including Securitize and SuperState.Solanausers can natively access onchain credit, treasuries, and short-term receivables and the ability to earn institutional-grade real-world yield.
With the launch of nBASIS, nOPAL, nWISDOM, nALPHA and nTBILL Vaults,Solana's 20+ million users can soon deposit stablecoins natively into Nest to unlock reliable, stable, real-world APY. Each deposit returns a Nest vaulttoken, a liquid, yield-bearing asset that accrues value over time and can move seamlessly acrossSolanaDeFi, from DEX liquidity pools to lending and structured products, with the ability to redeem at any point.
As part of this integration, Plume is also launching a deep partnership with[Squads Lab](https://edge.prnewswire.com/c/link/?t=0&l=en&o=4573545-1&h=2271106279&u=https://squads.xyz/&a=Squads+Lab),Solana's leading multi-sig and treasury management infrastructure provider. Plume will introduce its RWA yield pipelines across the Squads ecosystem, including a bespoke vault integrated for Altitude users and seamless RWA yield access for developers building with Grid.
*"Cryptois moving past the era of synthetic yield and into a market grounded in real economics. Stablecoins brought millions intocrypto, but yieldcoins will keep them here. This integration withSolanais the next step in building a transparent, programmable financial system at scale."*said Teddy Pornprinya, Co-Founder and CBO at Plume.
*"Plume already anchors over half of the industry's RWA activity, andSolanahas become one of the most efficient, high-throughput environments incrypto, making it a natural home for onchain credit, treasuries, and short-term receivables. Bringing our strengths together is how we unlock the next phase of onchain finan*ce".
By introducing institutional RWAs at scale, Plume is expanding theSolanaDeFiecosystem with sustainable, composable yield infrastructure that can underpin the next generation ofSolana-native financial applications.
Solanausers can instantly access boosted yield opportunities with Nest.
The Plume Nest Points Program is a rewards framework designed to turn participation into ownership. Users can earn Plume Nest Points by holding and using Nest vault tokens. The more users hold and deploy, the more they earn as part of the Season One program.
Solanausers will also soon unlock boosted yield opportunities with direct access to lending markets on Loopscale. These platform integrations allow leverage

tags.impact_reason: Altitude's launch as a global business account built on Solana's stablecoin rails, offering fiat and stablecoin transfers, bill pay, invoicing, accounting, and yield earning, is a major update for Solana's infrastructure, potentially attracting more businesses to the ecosystem.

This visual metaphor directly connects to the product's name and its function of providing high-level control over enterprise finance, overlooking a global network of 'stablecoin rails.' I included the text '$15B' as a holographic display on the pylon because it's a critical data point from the transcript that establishes the platform's credibility and scale, and integrating it diegetically aligns with the futuristic aesthetic.

It stands in a high-altitude command center with a floor-to-ceiling window showing the curve of the Earth at twilight. Glowing blue and green data streams, representing stablecoin rails, crisscross the globe below. A sophisticated, glowing holographic display emanates from the pylon's surface, showing financial data and the text '$15B' integrated into a circular graph. The lighting is cool and atmospheric, primarily sourced from the interface and the planetary network outside, creating deep shadows and sharp highlights on the pylon.

The pylon stands tall within a high-altitude command center, bathed in cool, atmospheric architectural lighting, emphasizing its epic scale. Behind it, a vast floor-to-ceiling window reveals the dramatic curve of the Earth at twilight, with glowing blue and green data streams, signifying stablecoin rails, vividly crisscrossing the globe far below. Emanating from the pylon's obsidian surface is a sophisticated, luminous holographic display, showcasing intricate financial data and the prominent text '$15B' seamlessly integrated into a dynamic circular graph. The primary light sources are the emanating holographic interface and the distant planetary network, casting deep, dramatic shadows and striking, sharp highlights across the polished obsidian, creating a high-contrast, ultra-photorealistic scene. Compose for a vertical 3:4 aspect ratio, with ample negative space at the top to accentuate the pylon's towering presence. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, cinematic, ultra-photorealistic, high dynamic range.

This visual metaphor directly connects to the product's name and its function of providing high-level control over enterprise finance, overlooking a global network of 'stablecoin rails.' In the center, a multi-faceted crystalline lens refracts the light from within, suggesting a powerful AI core. The subject is the polished surface of an obsidian control pylon, resembling a mirror-like, sleek corporate futurism aesthetic. Intricate, glowing blue circuit-like patterns are deeply etched into the polished obsidian material, pulsing with an internal, architectural light, creating sharp specular highlights and reflections. In the absolute center, a multi-faceted crystalline lens refracts the internal light with a holographic interface effect, suggesting a powerful AI core within. Subtle, diffused reflections of distant global data streams are visible on the hyper-reflective obsidian surface, emphasizing its profound connection to a vast network. The lighting is clean and precise, enhancing the depth and glow of the etched patterns. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, ultra-photorealistic, high dynamic range, cinematic lighting, realistic materials, subsurface scattering.

editorial.headline: Squads Unveils 'Altitude' to Automate Enterprise Finance on Solana
editorial.standfirst: The protocol securing $15B in assets pivots to challenge traditional fintech with a stablecoin-native business account and "trustless" AI agent guardrails.
key_takeaways: Squads now secures over $15 billion in value, cementing its status as the canonical multisig for the Solana ecosystem.
Launch of Altitude, a global business account offering USD/EUR rails, CFO tools, and institutional yield via partners like Plume.
New "Autonomous Finance" model pairs AI agents with deterministic onchain guardrails to remove human bottlenecks from operations.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
Squads CEO Stepan Simkin revealed that the company’s multisig infrastructure—already securing **$15 billion** in value—has effectively functioned as a shadow banking system for crypto-natives. With the launch of **Altitude**, Squads is formalizing this utility, offering a direct competitor to traditional fintechs like Brex or Mercury, but built entirely on stablecoin rails. The move signals a shift from pure security infrastructure to a full-stack financial operating system, designed to service not just Web3 natives but any global business seeking efficiency.

The critical innovation presented wasn't just cheaper payments; it's the concept of "Autonomous Finance." Simkin addressed a fatal flaw in current AI agents: hallucination. By pairing probabilistic AI agents with deterministic onchain guardrails, Altitude allows businesses to automate treasury management, rebalancing, and bill pay without human oversight. This "trustless execution" model removes the final bottleneck in enterprise automation—the human approver—by ensuring agents can only act within strict, programmable limits.

Strategically, the platform flips the traditional fintech expansion model. Instead of navigating regulatory licensing market-by-market, Altitude leverages self-custodial stablecoin accounts to offer instant global reach, adding local fiat rails only where necessary. With deep integrations into partners like **Plume Network** for institutional RWA yield and the release of the **Grid** API for developers, Squads is positioning itself as the backend infrastructure for the next generation of internet-native capital markets.
